last_action: 30/30 tasks done — PR #431 open for review (1266/1266 jest, 22/22 AA)

FR-001.title: Adopt Codex hybrid theme: owned light/dark palette, host fonts/accessibility inherited

FR-002.title: All text roles meet WCAG AA in both palettes

FR-003.title: Code blocks readable on owned surface in both themes

FR-004.title: Primitives migrate to Codex roles without API/message changes

FR-005.title: Overview is default landing view; document fallback when no activity

FR-006.title: Document rail (where) separated from completion marks (how far)

FR-007.title: Rail/steps fully workflow-driven, no stock-four assumption

FR-008.title: CTA uses workflow-derived label; extra commands in Other actions

FR-009.title: Every lifecycle state renders correct badge/marks/actions

FR-010.title: All markdown content types styled via existing emitted classes

FR-011.title: Hide empty meta/template remnants; branch metadata contrast

FR-012.title: Three-column grid with documented responsive behavior

FR-013.title: Inline review comments + refinement queue keep working

FR-014.title: Living-specs mode behavior preserved in new shell

FR-016.title: Recovery/safety affordances surface in new shell

FR-017.title: Stories and viewer docs updated with the design

context: constraint: docs/viewer-states.md state machine must hold unchanged
constraint: markdown emitted-class contract and extension<->webview message protocol are frozen interfaces
constraint: keep inline-comment UX (line-anchored comments + refinement queue)
intent: Ship the Codex redesign (owned palette, Overview-first shell, workflow-driven rail, data-display skin) in the production viewer with zero behavioral regressions
expectations: sidebar tree, spec-editor, workflow-editor webviews unchanged
approach: Reskin-and-relayout over frozen seams: re-value the existing token layer to the Codex owned light/dark palette, recompose App.tsx into the shell regions (header + view switch, grouped document rail, 72ch reading column, run-facts aside, CTA footer with Other-actions menu) with each region kept on its existing component and state seam, and restyle the markdown pipeline's emitted classes for the data-display skin. Signals, message protocol, state derivation, and viewer-states transitions untouched.

decisions.decision: adopt the palette by re-valuing the existing token layer
decisions.why: every partial already consumes these token names; one coherent restyle, no rename churn
decisions.rejected: shipping codex.css alongside and porting components onto .cx-* classes

decisions.decision: shell regions map 1:1 onto existing components (SpecHeader/NavigationBar/FooterActions + new RunAside)
decisions.why: components already own the right state seams; markup/CSS change only, protocol and state machine fenced
decisions.rejected: a fresh shell component tree replacing them

decisions.decision: Overview replaces the Activity toggle, defaulting by data presence; living mode exempt
decisions.why: panel is already a peer region behind a signal — default-state change delivers the design cheaply
decisions.rejected: keeping the toggle and only restyling it

decisions.decision: code keeps highlight.js on an owned always-dark surface in both themes
decisions.why: the accepted proposal fixes light-mode code without touching the highlighting pipeline
decisions.rejected: per-theme syntax palettes overriding hljs classes

decisions.decision: host typography (Geist retired) and 6px geometry supersede the 2px terminal direction; docs updated
decisions.why: the selected design inherits editor fonts and softer geometry; docs must not describe the old look
decisions.rejected: keeping Geist lead / keeping 2px radii under the new palette

decisions.decision: kept StepTab logic untouched; the rail look is CSS + NavigationBar structure
decisions.why: the four canonical states are test-covered and behaviorally frozen
decisions.rejected: rewriting StepTab markup for rail-specific classes

decisions.decision: theme-dependent tokens are per-theme literals, never :root var() chains
decisions.why: a :root alias resolves at :root — the light theme shipped invisible headings until --header-* was re-declared per block

decisions.decision: hero stat chips serve as the Overview metrics row
decisions.why: ActivityHero already carries task/coverage/check counts — a second metrics band would double-report

plan.summary: Full plan + research + data-model + UI contract for adopting the Codex design over frozen viewer seams
plan.key_finding: Every Codex region maps onto an existing component and state seam (getApproveLabel, enhancementButtons, hasAnyData, livingMode), so the entire redesign is markup+CSS with zero protocol or derivation changes

tasks.summary: 30 tasks, 8 phases: tokens foundation -> US1 data-display skin (8-way parallel wave) -> US2 lifecycle verification -> US3 Overview-first shell (5-way component wave) -> US4 custom workflows -> US5 layout+comments -> polish/docs/reconciliation

implement.summary: Codex design shipped across tokens, 14 CSS partials, and the shell (Overview-first, document rail, run aside, floating footer) with zero protocol/derivation changes — 30/30 tasks, 1266/1266 tests, 22/22 AA

T001.did: Token layer re-valued to the Codex owned palette: dark/light literals for canvas/surfaces/ink/accent/status, always-dark code surface, host-font leads (Geist retired from tokens), radius 4/6/8, HC stays host-derived

T002.did: Code/tree/legacy pre blocks on the owned always-dark surface with token-driven hljs syntax roles; language chip chrome kept

T003.did: Tables on the surface treatment (mono headers, row-only borders, hover, tabular numerals); user stories as accent-edged cards; review + scenario hues moved onto tokens

T004.did: Requirement rows: info-hue id badges (SC stays success), gutter-aligned scan rows

T005.did: Callouts to borderless soft-fill surfaces keyed by type; template-instructions removed from the reading view

T006.did: Phase headers as compact tinted cards; softened phase-num/chips; checkbox check ink fixed to on-status color for both themes

T007.did: Entities to hairline list rows; checklist head/file chips off the always-dark code token (light-theme fix); decision cards 20px with soft badges; accent-flip hover retired per Codex

T008.did: Codex document scale (46px title, 22px quiet sections), inline code on primary ink, empty spec-meta hidden, branch chip guaranteed contrast, neutral quote/input edges

T009.did: TOC onto the rail-button selection language (lifted surface, no prompt glyph); neutral toggle hover

T010.did: Fidelity pass on 008/060 spec+tasks+artifacts in both themes: caught and fixed the frozen --header-*/--border-accent var-chain (invisible light-theme headings); all content types verified styled

T011.did: Badges to Codex soft pills: mono microtype on tinted washes, working states breathe the warm hue, completed drops the host charts-green

T012.did: Buttons to Codex roles: sentence case, primary=accent/accent-ink pair, secondary/ghost/enhancement use surface contrast, destructive soft-semantic; ids and visibility untouched

T013.did: State-matrix verified on Transitions stories (specifying/tasks-created/completed, both themes): badges, step marks, footer affordances all per docs/viewer-states.md; stories needed no markup changes — reactivity flowed through

T014.did: viewerMode signal (overview|document) replaces the Activity boolean; landing view derives from recorded activity, living mode + disabled panel force documents

T015.did: Shell grid: rail | reading column | run aside with 980px aside-yield and 700px rail-strip; floating-footer clearance in the scroll column

T016.did: SpecHeader: title-first row with the Overview/Documents view switch; formatStatusLabel exported for reuse

T017.did: NavigationBar as the document rail: Pipeline group + per-step artifact groups always visible; StepTab logic untouched (rail look is CSS); selection=lifted surface, completion=rail mark; living tier strip preserved; NavigationBar stories host vertically

T018.did: Footer as floating glass pill: context line names the forward action, enhancementButtons collapse into an Other-actions menu, in-flight renders context only; Transitions stories contain the fixed footer

T019.did: RunAside: run facts (status/phase/task/progress/checks/concerns) rendered only when present, with three stories

T020.did: Overview presentation: latest-activity feed from real history, approach behind progressive disclosure, hero/cards/error boundary kept (boundary now surfaces the error message)

T021.did: Shell integrated and verified: Overview default on 392 (real hero/feed/decisions), documents view on implementing-172 light (live 66% rail, in-flight footer contract); fixed the Preact h-shadow crash the integration surfaced

T022.did: Workflow map verified: rail renders arbitrary ordered steps with custom labels and correct done/in-flight/pending/locked marks from workflow data (7-step secure-delivery story)

T023.did: Free-named and step-owned documents group under their owning step in the rail (01-01-PLAN.md, threat-model.md verified in story)

T024.did: Custom-workflow behavior verified: full jest suite green (derivation untouched, 1266 tests incl. workflow/lifecycle/currentDoc suites) + custom-workflow rail story added as the visual regression anchor

T025.did: Responsive sweep 700/980/1600 verified: aside yields at 980, rail folds to a scrollable chip strip at 700 (specificity fix), prose cap holds, no page-level horizontal scroll

T026.did: Comment machinery verified token-driven (palette flowed via T001); review affordances unified on the info hue; pending-refinement queue affordance (Refine N) preserved through the new footer

T027.did: Bundled Geist retired end-to-end: font-face injection, webview URI, webpack copy rule, and the 27KB asset removed — webview typography now inherits the host editor

T028.did: Docs with the change: DESIGN.md rewritten to the Codex system (owned palette, shell, geometry, bans incl. the :root var-chain lesson); viewer-states.md Activity section became the Overview view with new landing diagram; README rail/Overview/footer descriptions updated. Screenshot retake list deferred to release (filenames stay stable)

T029.did: Codex reference retired from the story tree; rationale + reference stylesheet preserved at docs/redesign/; updated real-component stories are the canonical visual baseline; Storybook build green

T030.did: Final validation: 1266/1266 jest, webpack compile clean, Storybook build green, 22/22 WCAG pairs pass in both owned palettes, 700/980/1600 width sweep clean, state matrix + content types + custom workflow verified

verified.result: 1266/1266 pass, 99 suites — zero behavioral test rewrites

verified.command: npm run build-storybook + headless Chrome screenshots
verified.result: green; Overview/documents shells, all content types, lifecycle states verified in both themes

verified.what: WCAG AA audit of both owned palettes

verified.result: aside yields at 980, rail folds to chip strip at 700, no page-level horizontal scroll
